230 G0110G1_DRESS_SELF_CD G0110G1_DRESS_SELF_CD G0110G1 ADL Assistance: Dress Self Performance Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the resident's self-performance ability for dressing themselves. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Independent - no help or staff oversight at any time
1=Supervision - oversight, encouragement or cueing
2=Limited assistance - resident highly involved in activity; staff provide guided maneuvering of limbs
